display_text: Mekansm, Cost: 1775: Provides an active ability, Restore, that instantly heals all allied heroes in a 1200 radius for 250 health for a high mana cost. display_text: Mekansm, Cost: 1775: Core teamfight utility item providing an instant group heal and passive sustain aura. Used to save multiple allies from burst damage, survive a push, or swing a fight with a large health swing. The long cooldown makes timing critical.

display_text: Mekansm, Cost: 1775: A classic support and offlane item. High value on heroes who group early to push towers or teamfight, or on melee initiators who can apply the heal in the middle of a fight. Its high mana cost requires mana management from the user.
